# Metaphors Flow

Choose sensory / spatial metaphors that should drive Impeccable craft.

## Steps

1. Propose 2–3 metaphors consistent with the primary feeling (e.g. "clear desk", "lantern in fog", "cockpit").
2. Reject mixed metaphors and AI-default vague "journey" language unless earned.
3. Translate winning metaphor into craft constraints (motion, density, contrast, copy verbs).
4. Document anti-metaphors (what the UI must not feel like physically).

## Handoff

Output should be pasteable into an Impeccable briefing.

Persist to `.productfeeling/briefs/<slug>-metaphors.md` when available.
